query: What is the most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026, latest available as of late June 2026? Report the exact YTD acres and date.
answer:
## Summary

**Direct answer:** The most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026, as displayed on the NIFC Statistics and National Fire News pages during the late-June 2026 window, is **3,197,098 acres** (with **36,463 YTD wildfires**).

**Date:** This figure corresponds to the NIFC pages' YTD statistics current to that window — the National Fire News page carried a Preparedness Level timestamp of **"as of June 29, 2026 at 7:30 a.m. MDT"** with a narrative dated **July 2, 2026**. National Preparedness Level was 4.

**Key caveat on vintage:** NIFC updates these numbers daily (Mon–Fri) from the NICC Incident Management Situation Report. When I pulled the live IMSR, it had already rolled to the **July 3, 2026** edition, which shows a slightly newer figure of **3,237,346 acres / 36,594 fires** — just beyond the "late June" window. For the question as posed, **3,197,098 acres** is the correct figure. As of early July 2026, YTD fires were running at 132% and YTD acres at 152% of the 2016–2025 ten-year average.
